div.p: T1: Committed (Should be present) | T2: Aborted (CLRs present) | T3: Active (Must be rolled back)

ol.li: WAL Protocol: Log entries 250, 350, 500 must reach disk before pages.
Idempotency: pageLSN check ensures Redo can repeat multiple times.
CLRs: Compensation Log Records ensure Undo never rolls back the same action twice.

g.text: CLR indicates undo of 350 already persisted
